name: Resolution time distribution
sql: SELECT CASE WHEN DATEDIFF('HOUR', created_at, resolved_at) < 4 THEN '< 4h' WHEN DATEDIFF('HOUR', created_at, resolved_at) < 24 THEN '4-24h' WHEN DATEDIFF('HOUR', created_at, resolved_at) < 72 THEN '1-3d' ELSE '> 3d' END AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS ticket_count FROM tickets WHERE resolved_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY bucket
